name: task
description: Persistent project Tasks for Codex, Claude Code, and Pi

interface.shortDescription: Create, recover, and advance persistent project Tasks.
interface.longDescription: A deterministic file-backed Task system that keeps work state, relationships, lifecycle, and activity logs portable across agent hosts and sessions.
defaultPrompt: Find and resume an existing project Task.
Create a Task for this confirmed multi-session effort.
Record a durable decision in the current Task.
